name: Cartoon Party Game Assets
description: Groovy mascot-style bomb character with lit fuse and phone prop for party app graphics
prompt_template: cartoon bomb mascot, full body, round dark navy bomb with lit fuse, big oval eyes, smiling mouth, white gloves, simple shoes, no human body, {phone_pose}, {character_pose}, {scene}, {composition}, {palette}, clean 2d vector art, thick black outline, flat colors, plain background
negative_prompt: human, woman, girl, female body, person, skin, hair, realistic face, anime girl, sexy, text, letters, words, logo, watermark, signature, photo, photorealistic, 3d render, frame, border

palette: hot pink, electric blue, yellow, mint
neon pink, sky blue, tangerine, violet
